name: Area efect
description: Area efect is a launcher variant that releases three rockets while only consuming one round. A Maliwan barrel boosts projectile velocity and tightens accuracy. As the shots often travel through standard-sized foes, reliable damage usually comes from placing splash on the ground or nearby walls rather than landing direct impacts.
notes: Most effective when you aim at close surfaces just beneath or next to enemies, particularly human-sized targets and Loaders.
